title: plantago sempervirens subsp. asperrima
intro: Plantago sempervirens subsp. asperrima is a perennial herbaceous plant, commonly known as Rough-leaved Plantain or Asperrima Plantain. It is native to Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, Plantago sempervirens subsp. asperrima is used to make herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
